pi_items.source: Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies Description: 10-digit unique identification number for health care providers. Verified via OpenMRS schema documentation showing description field supports varchar(1024) for attribute type descriptions.

Verified through OpenMRS documentation and GitHub search results confirming org.openmrs.customdatatype.datatype.FreeTextDatatype as a standard datatype class in OpenMRS. The fragment 'FreeTextDatatype' correctly matches the class name. Verifier.py (line 76) confirms it checks for either the fragment or 'FreeText' in the actual datatype string.

Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies Min Occurrences: 0. Verified via OpenMRS database schema documentation showing provider_attribute_type table has min_occurs integer column. Value 0 indicates optional attribute (standard OpenMRS convention).

Task description (line 5 of task.json) specifies Max Occurrences: 1. Verified via OpenMRS database schema documentation showing provider_attribute_type table has max_occurs integer column. Value 1 indicates single-valued attribute (non-repeating).

Verified via Bahmni documentation and task_utils.sh (line 9) which defines OPENMRS_BASE_URL as https://localhost/openmrs. This matches the admin_url metadata claim. Web search confirmed OpenMRS admin interface is accessible at https://<host>/openmrs/admin.

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a new Provider Attribute Type named 'National Provider Identifier' with description '10-digit unique identification number for health care providers' using FreeTextDatatype datatype, with min occurrences 0 and max occurrences 1. All metadata values are consistent with OpenMRS provider_attribute_type schema and standard attribute type configuration patterns. The data being created is synthetic (generated within the task execution) in the OpenMRS/Bahmni test environment at https://localhost/openmrs/admin.
